clEntries.7.5.34: Fixed condition cards in air quality & DIN rail meter drivers. Added standardized button flow triggers (press, double press, long press, release, knob rotation). Synced upstream driver improvements and updated app assets.
clEntries.7.5.33: Fixed condition cards in air quality & DIN rail meter drivers. Added standardized button flow triggers (press, double press, long press, release, knob rotation). Synced upstream driver improvements and updated app assets.
clEntries.7.5.32: v7.5.32: . Harmonized driver icons, updated app store assets, and restored draft-to-test  fixes.
clEntries.7.5.31: v7.5.31: Harmonized 228 driver icons with new SVG assets. Updated app store images. Fixed various device icon inconsistencies. Added draft-to-test promotion  for faster testing.
clEntries.7.5.30: Harmonized icons across all 228 drivers, updated app store assets, and added support for new soil sensor fingerprint (_TZE284_0ints6wl).
clEntries.7.5.29: Bug fixes and improvements for Tuya Zigbee devices. Added support for new soil sensor fingerprint. Updated diagnostics and security.
clEntries.7.5.28: Added 3,208 new fingerprints, improved driver matching for soil sensors, and fixed various device initialization issues.
clEntries.7.5.27: v7.5.27: . New IR pairing wizard, improved power clamp meter, and various bug fixes.
clEntries.7.5.26: Fixed SDK3 deprecation warnings across all 45 drivers by migrating from deprecated getTriggerCard to getDeviceTriggerCard. Improved stability and compatibility with latest Homey firmware.
clEntries.7.5.25: v7.5.25: Fixed critical MODULE_NOT_FOUND crash on fingerbot, motion_sensor_2, and sirentemphumidsensor. Added PJ-1203A mapping. New fingerprints for power_clamp_meter.
